description:
Innovaccer is a leading data activation company enabling over 10,000 providers to transform healthcare across 500+ locations in the US with its innovative solutions and heuristic analytics. In this episode of 'This is My Architecture,' Ravi from Innovaccer talks about their Data Activation Platform that analyzes various clinical and non-clinical data sets and provides critical insights that enable patient care delivery.
